purpose: Loads and applies the Matrix.ico window icon to a Form, using WM_SETICON for small/big/small2 icon slots for correct taskbar icon display.
calls_out_to: user32!SendMessage(WM_SETICON) — sets ICON_SMALL, ICON_BIG, ICON_SMALL2 on the HWND
invariants: Load tries: embedded resource → sidecar file in BaseDirectory → ExtractAssociatedIcon fallback
ApplyTo sets Form.Icon and then sends WM_SETICON for all three slots if handle is created
Dispose avoids double-disposing when small and large point to the same cloned Icon
gotchas: ICON_SMALL2 (index 2) must be set explicitly for correct taskbar grouping icon on Windows — Form.Icon alone does not set it
ApplyTo is a no-op for WM_SETICON if the form handle is not yet created; call it again after handle creation if needed
